AHMAD FARIS BIN ZULKIFLI
ahmad.faris@graduate.utm.my | +60-12-345-6789 | linkedin.com/in/ahmadfaris | github.com/ahmadfaris

EDUCATION
Bachelor of Computer Science (Data Science), Universiti Teknologi Malaysia
Expected Graduation: June 2025 | CGPA: 3.72 / 4.00
Dean's List: Semester 1 & 2, Year 2

SKILLS
Programming: Python, R, SQL, JavaScript
ML Frameworks: Scikit-learn, TensorFlow, Keras, XGBoost
Data Tools: Pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib, Seaborn, Tableau
Cloud: AWS (S3, EC2, Lambda), Google Cloud Platform
Other: Git, Docker, FastAPI, Flask, Jupyter Notebook

EXPERIENCE
Data Science Intern — TechCorp Malaysia (Jun–Sep 2024)
• helped build a customer churn prediction model using Python and scikit-learn
• was involved in cleaning and preprocessing 500,000-row datasets
• assisted in creating a dashboard in Tableau for the analytics team

UNDERGRADUATE RESEARCH ASSISTANT — UTM AI Lab (Jan–May 2024)
• worked on natural language processing research under Dr. Rahman
• helped collect and annotate text data for sentiment analysis
• was part of the team that prepared a conference paper submission

PROJECTS
Student Grade Predictor (2024)
• used machine learning to predict student academic performance
• built with Python, scikit-learn, and Flask
• deployed on AWS EC2

Sentiment Analysis System (2023)
• created a Twitter sentiment classifier using BERT
• achieved 87% accuracy on the test set
• built REST API using FastAPI

ACTIVITIES
• Vice President, UTM Data Science Club
• Technical Lead, UTM AI Hackathon 2024
• UTM Data Science Challenge 2024 — Top 10 Finalist
• IEEE Algorithm Competition 2023 — 2nd Place
